title: aciphylla traversii
intro: Aciphylla traversii, also known as the Lady fern or New Zealand fern, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Aciphylla traversii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Aciphylla traversii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aciphylla traversii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
